raw:
[
  {
    "type": "derived_from",
    "source": "pA \\cdot RT",
    "target": "\\frac{1}{2}",
    "equation_id": "1",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "LHS value is derived from the product of pA and RT."
  },
  {
    "type": "derived_from",
    "source": "0.5",
    "target": "\\frac{1}{2}",
    "equation_id": "2",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "LHS value is directly defined as 0.5."
  },
  {
    "type": "derived_from",
    "source": "z_A",
    "target": "\\frac{v_2}{A}",
    "equation_id": "3",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "z_A is defined as the ratio of v_2 to A."
  },
  {
    "type": "depends_on",
    "source": "a, b",
    "target": "\\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}",
    "equation_id": "6",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "The square root value depends on a and b."
  },
  {
    "type": "depends_on",
    "source": "a, b",
    "target": "\\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}",
    "equation_id": "7",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "The square root value depends on a and b."
  },
  {
    "type": "derived_from",
    "source": "M, N_0",
    "target": "q_{gpcsat}",
    "equation_id": "9",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "q_{gpcsat} is derived from the ratio of M to N_0."
  },
  {
    "type": "depends_on",
    "source": "RT, N_0",
    "target": "\\frac{RT}{N_0}",
    "equation_id": "10",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "LHS value depends on RT and N_0."
  },
  {
    "type": "depends_on",
    "source": "p, h, P_{d}",
    "target": "f_{des}",
    "equation_id": "12",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "Desorption rate depends on p, h, and P_{d}."
  },
  {
    "type": "defines",
    "source": "h_{eq}, pA",
    "target": "K",
    "equation_id": "13",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "K is defined in terms of h_{eq} and pA."
  },
  {
    "type": "derived_from",
    "source": "N_0, MART",
    "target": "Q",
    "equation_id": "14",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "Q is derived from N_0 over the square root of 2πMART."
  },
  {
    "type": "governs",
    "source": "g, q",
    "target": "\\frac{dh}{dt}",
    "equation_id": "16",
    "direction": "positive",
    "description": "The rate of change in h is governed by the product of g and q."
  },
  {
    "type": "governs",
    "source": "pA",
    "target": "\\frac{\\partial^2 pA(x, t)}{\\partial x^2}",
    "equation_id": "17",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "The second partial derivative of pA governs its spatial variation."
  },
  {
    "type": "governs",
    "source": "D, t",
    "target": "x_s",
    "equation_id": "19",
    "direction": "positive",
    "description": "The penetration depth increases with the square root of Dt."
  },
  {
    "type": "governs",
    "source": "x_s",
    "target": "\\frac{x_t - x_s}{\\left( \\sqrt{2} \\right)}",
    "equation_id": "25",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "x_s is involved in the calculation of x_t."
  },
  {
    "type": "depends_on",
    "source": "N_0, q, h, P_d",
    "target": "\\frac{x_t - x_s}{4RT}",
    "equation_id": "26",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "LHS value depends on N_0, q, h, and P_d."
  },
  {
    "type": "derived_from",
    "source": "D_{\\text{eff}}, {\\left| \\frac{ds}{dx} \\right|}",
    "target": "D_{xp}",
    "equation_id": "33",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "D_{xp} is derived from the ratio of D_s to |ds/dx|."
  },
  {
    "type": "derived_from",
    "source": "q, K",
    "target": "s",
    "equation_id": "30",
    "direction": "unknown",
    "description": "s is defined as the ratio of qK to 2cQ."
  },
  {
    "type": "causal",
    "source": "gpc",
    "target": "gpcsat",
    "equation_id": "46",
    "direction": "positive",
    "description": "Saturation growth per cycle is influenced by film growth per cycle."
  }
]
